title: Verify Figure One Noise Columns
summary: Verified and restored Figure 1 as the fixed-non-Gaussianity residual-noise grid with method rows and increasing-noise columns.

user_inputs.text: User flagged that the draft inserted the non-Gaussianity figure twice or in the wrong role, and requested that the first figure instead show fixed non-Gaussianity with increasing residual noise in rows.

Clarification: Figure 1 should keep the existing layout with first row sign restrictions, second row standard DW, third row robust DW, fixed structural non-Gaussianity, and columns increasing residual noise from no noise to medium noise to strong noise.

agent_actions.description: Inspected both rendered grid figures and confirmed the intended Figure 1 should use sign/covariance, standard DW, and robust DW rows with residual-noise columns.
Restored the noise-grid generator and PNG to the committed intended orientation after an initial mistaken transpose, and recorded the user clarification in durable logs.

checks.description: Rendered and visually inspected manuscript/figures/fig_sign_dw_robust_noise_grid.png: method rows and noise columns confirmed
python scripts/check_manuscript.py: passed with expected open-milestone warning before closure
git diff --check: passed with line-ending normalization warnings only
